title: Session 98: Taylor's Series
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview Earlier we studied linear and quadratic approximations. If we continue to improve our approximations by using the third, fourth, fifth, … derivatives the result is a power series. These power series are called Taylor’s series. This session gives a formula describing the terms of a Taylor’s series and a few examples of its application.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Introduction to Taylor’s Series
Clip 2: Taylor’s Formula
Clip 3: Taylor’s Formula Examples
